I was using Sequel Pro for a long time, but it's not being maintained anymore. So I switched to Tableplus and I love it.

Obsdidian is hands down the best note taking app I have used. It's a local first note taking app, which means all your notes are stored on your computer and not on the cloud. It has a lot of features and is highly customizable. The best part is that it's free.

This may be the most used app on my computer. It's like the default mac screenshot app, but on steroids. It has a lot of features like annotating screenshots, recording screen, etc. It's not free, but it's worth every penny.

Before I got these as a gift, I thought the Airpods Pro was the best wireless earbuds. But these are on a whole different level. The sound quality is amazing, the noise cancellation is great, and the battery life is much better than the Airpods Pro. I use these for everything, from listening to music to taking calls. I highly recommend these.
I don't update my phone often, so getting the latest iPhone was a big deal for me. I love the camera on this phone and the new 120hz display. Its a much better iPhone 12 Pro Max I had before.
This is a solid microphone for streaming and discord calls. It requires an interface to work, but the sound quality is great. It's also very affordable for the quality it provides.
I was a huge fan of the OG xbox, so I had to get this one. I don't play games as much as I used to, but I still enjoy playing games on this console and Game Pass is a great deal.
